pr.title: util/log: replace deprecated io/ioutil with os in file_api.go
pr.body:
`io/ioutil` has been deprecated since Go 1.16, with its functionality
moved to the `io` and `os` packages. The sole remaining use in
`pkg/util/log/file_api.go` was `ioutil.ReadDir`, which is replaced by
`os.ReadDir`.

`os.ReadDir` returns `[]os.DirEntry` instead of `[]os.FileInfo`, so
the loop now calls `entry.Type().IsRegular()` for the file type check
and `entry.Info()` to obtain the `os.FileInfo` needed by `MakeFileInfo`.

The nogo exclusion for `file_api.go` is also removed since the
deprecated import no longer exists.

Resolves: #92864
Epic: none

Release note: None

Generated by Claude Code Auto-Solver
